skipped_blocks: DVA: no position snapshot found at block time
data_quality_gaps: estimated_notional = portfolio_value × max_single_pct — upper-bound estimate, not sizing-engine output (G10 provisional)
shadow exit P&L = total realized P&L from original entry to close — not only the post-block portion
positions.json reflects end-of-session state — positions closed intra-session may be absent from reconstruction
